conclusion: E3 proved that a branch Raw network-state release can gate one controlled interpreter bridge, which reads the network-resident multi-capsule language graph, emits an auditable interpreter signal, and writes bridge state back to the remote receiver.
truth_boundary: E3 proves trigger-to-interpreter coupling under a controlled executor. It does not prove the network executes code by itself, CPU-free computation, autonomous cognition, digital life, or digital supercomputing.
